name: scalascript-wallet-connect-js
description: Test-time npm dependencies for the wallet-connect Scala.js module. The Scala.js Node test runner walks up from `js/target/scala-*/.../main.js` to find `node_modules`; these mirror crypto-noble-js so the noble CryptoBackend (ChaCha20-Poly1305 + X25519 + HKDF + ed25519 + sha256) can resolve when WC tests register it.
